mapper.update: UPDATE apt_board_comment /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.board.free.mapper.IResidentBoardMapper.updateBoardComment*/ SET cmt_cn = #{cmtCn}, mdf_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE cmt_no = #{cmtNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT * /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.board.free.mapper.IResidentBoardMapper.boardFreeList*/ FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT p.post_no ,p.board_no ,p.ttl ,p.cn ,p.wrtr_id ,m.user_nm AS wrtr_nm ,p.prrt_cd ,p.reg_dttm ,p.mdf_dttm ,p.inq_cnt ,p.del_yn ,p.atch_file_id ,p.opn_yn FROM apt_board_post p LEFT JOIN member m ON p.wrtr_id = m.user_id WHERE p.board_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND p.del_yn = 'N'
AND p.ttl LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND (p.wrtr_id LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR m.user_nm LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%')
AND p.cn LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND p.ttl LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
ORDER BY p.reg_dttm DESC, p.post_no DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.board.free.mapper.IResidentBoardMapper.selectBoardFreeCount*/ FROM apt_board_post p LEFT JOIN member m ON p.wrtr_id = m.user_id WHERE p.board_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND p.del_yn = 'N'
AND p.ttl LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND (p.wrtr_id LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR m.user_nm LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%')
AND p.cn LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND p.ttl LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'

SELECT /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.board.free.mapper.IResidentBoardMapper.selectOneBoardFree*/ p.post_no ,p.board_no ,p.ttl ,p.cn ,p.wrtr_id ,m.user_nm AS wrtr_nm ,p.prrt_cd ,p.reg_dttm ,p.mdf_dttm ,p.inq_cnt ,p.del_yn ,p.atch_file_id ,p.opn_yn FROM apt_board_post p LEFT JOIN member m ON p.wrtr_id = m.user_id WHERE p.post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO apt_board_comment ( /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.board.free.mapper.IResidentBoardMapper.insertSubComment*/ cmt_no ,post_no ,cmt_group ,cmt_cn ,cmt_sort_ord ,reg_dttm ,del_yn ,mdf_dttm ,user_no ) VALUES ( seq_board_comment.nextval ,#{postNo} ,( SELECT cmt_group FROM apt_board_comment WHERE cmt_no = #{cmtNo}) ,#{cmtCn} ,( SELECT MAX(cmt_sort_ord) FROM apt_board_comment WHERE cmt_group = ( SELECT cmt_group FROM apt_board_comment WHERE cmt_no = #{cmtNo} ) ) + 1 ,SYSDATE ,'N' ,SYSDATE ,#{userNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT /*kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.board.free.mapper.IResidentBoardMapper.boardFreeComment*/ c.cmt_no ,c.post_no ,c.cmt_group ,c.cmt_cn ,c.cmt_sort_ord ,c.reg_dttm ,c.del_yn ,c.mdf_dttm ,m.user_no ,m.user_id ,m.user_nm FROM apt_board_comment c LEFT JOIN member m on c.user_no = m.user_no WHERE c.post_no = #{postNo} AND c.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY c.cmt_group ASC, c.cmt_sort_ord ASC

SELECT file_group_no ,file_og_name ,file_save_uuid ,file_path ,file_ext ,file_size ,mime_type ,reg_dt ,mdf_dt ,file_sort_order ,down_cnt ,google_id ,cat FROM attach_file WHERE file_group_no = #{fileGroupNo}
mapper.insert: /* * MERGE란? * → 있으면 INSERT 안 하고, 없으면 INSERT 하는 Oracle 문법. * * 왜 사용? * → 글쓰기 버튼을 여러 번 눌러도 같은 게시판이 중복 생성되지 않게 하기 위해. */ MERGE INTO APT_BOARD_INSTANCE B USING ( SELECT #{aptCmplexNo} || '_free' AS BOARD_NO, #{aptCmplexNo} AS APT_CMPLEX_NO, 'FREE' AS BOARD_TY_CD, '자유게시판' AS BOARD_NM, 'Y' AS USE_YN FROM DUAL ) S ON ( B.APT_CMPLEX_NO = S.APT_CMPLEX_NO AND B.BOARD_TY_CD = S.BOARD_TY_CD ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BOARD_NO, APT_CMPLEX_NO, BOARD_TY_CD, BOARD_NM, USE_YN ) VALUES ( S.BOARD_NO, S.APT_CMPLEX_NO, S.BOARD_TY_CD, S.BOARD_NM, S.USE_YN )
